message:
chore: close 25+ verified conformance beads + fix extensions_js lifetime

Verified and closed conformance beads for tiers 1a-2d, community
extensions (mitsuhiko, hjanuschka, tmustier, nicobailon, qualisero),
specific extensions (plan-mode, doom-overlay, subagent, etc.), and
infrastructure beads (Phase 2, Phase 7, Phase 8).

Fix lifetime error in extensions_js.rs __pi_host_read_file_sync
closure by returning String instead of Value<'_>.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
